name: exists-null-bool
description: Three single-value matchers in one AND selection: field existence check, explicit null match, and a boolean value match.
input_yaml:
title: Exists, null, bool
logsource:
  category: registry_event
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|exists: true
    TargetObject: null
    Reversible: true
  condition: selection
